description: Data-driven validation schema for News Intelligence Platform. Uses ONLY real ingested articles from the platform database — no synthetic data.

sampling_method.description: Stratified sample from existing Articles table, grouped by language and source diversity. Ground truth is inferred from existing Story/Event/Entity relationships, duplicate flags, and content-hash collisions.
steps: 1. Query all articles with content length > 200 chars
3. Stratify by source to ensure diversity
4. Include articles already linked to stories/events for cluster evaluation
5. Include articles flagged as duplicates for dedup evaluation
6. Include articles with extracted entities for NER evaluation
7. Include articles in events with conflict_flag for contradiction evaluation
8. Build pseudo-ground-truth from existing DB relationships

pseudo_ground_truth_rules.clustering: Articles sharing the same story_id are ground-truth same-cluster. Articles in different stories under the same event_id are ground-truth related-cluster.
pseudo_ground_truth_rules.dedup: Articles with is_duplicate=True and duplicate_of set are ground-truth duplicates. Articles sharing content_hash are ground-truth duplicates.
pseudo_ground_truth_rules.entities: Entity consistency is measured by comparing entities extracted across articles in the same story — entities appearing in >50% of cluster articles are ground-truth for that cluster.
pseudo_ground_truth_rules.geo: Events with location_country set provide ground-truth location for their linked articles.
pseudo_ground_truth_rules.contradiction: Events with conflict_flag=True indicate contradiction exists among their articles.

evaluation_record_schema.has_event: bool — linked to Event via Story
